response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong alignment with the Staff Software Engineer role, particularly in distributed systems, AI-driven development, and technical strategy. His recent work at re:cinq on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators directly matches the AI-native engineering environment. While his operational ownership and stakeholder management experience are less explicitly detailed, his background in high-throughput systems and full-stack leadership suggests readiness for the role.
strengths: Deep expertise in distributed systems and high-throughput architectures (e.g., Sociomantic, Dunnhumby).
Hands-on experience with AI-driven engineering (re:cinq, MCP code generators, agentic workflows).
Proven technical leadership across diverse stacks (TypeScript, Python, DLang) and domains (web, embedded, GIS).
concerns: Operational ownership (on-call, monitoring) is not explicitly highlighted in resume.
Stakeholder management across product/leadership is implied but not detailed.
Limited evidence of direct LLM/ML product experience beyond AI-agent tooling.
